title: Potential corruption of backup db when backing up a db last written by sqlite<3.7.0
key_bug_features: Backing up db last written by sqlite<3.7.0
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, value REAL DEFAULT 0.0, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Test2', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_table SET value = CAST('2.5' AS REAL) WHERE id = 1;
